item.name: Create Target
item.description:
**type enum**: personal | network
**status** (read-only): active | achieved | expired

item.name: Reassign Parent
item.description: Requires `hierarchy.write`. Pass `null` to detach from parent.

item.name: Create User
item.description:
Requires `users.write`. Creating `admin` requires super admin.

**role**: admin | leader | seller
**isSuperAdmin**: only for admin role

body.raw:
{
  "displayName": "Leader A",
  "email": "leader@evilla.com",
  "password": "SecurePass123!",
  "phone": "+96891234567",
  "role": "leader", // seller, leader
  "sellerCode": "", // for seller only
  "parentId": null, // for leaders and sellers
  "commissionPercentage": 5,
}

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "status": 201,
  "message": "User created",
  "data": {
    "user": {
      "id": "CU2eark2KmXT3AVU2sJpPptIq9k2",
      "displayName": "Evilla Super Admin",
      "email": "admin@evilla.com",
      "phone": "+96891234567",
      "sellerCode": null,
      "role": "leader",
      "parentId": null,
      "commissionPercentage": 5,
      "status": "active",
      "language": "en",
      "createdAt": "2026-06-08T10:00:00.000Z",
      "isSuperAdmin": true,
      "permissions": []
    },
    "customAuthToken": "eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.example"
  }
}

item.name: Update Admin Permissions
item.description: Super admin only. Cannot modify super admin accounts.

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "status": 200,
  "message": "Permissions updated",
  "data": {
    "id": "CU2eark2KmXT3AVU2sJpPptIq9k2",
    "displayName": "Evilla Super Admin",
    "email": "admin@evilla.com",
    "phone": "+96891234567",
    "sellerCode": null,
    "role": "admin",
    "parentId": null,
    "commissionPercentage": 0,
    "status": "active",
    "language": "en",
    "createdAt": "2026-06-08T10:00:00.000Z",
    "isSuperAdmin": false,
    "permissions": [
      "sales.read",
      "withdrawals.read",
      "analytics.read"
    ]
  }
}
